migration_note: No database schema change. The authoritative JSON order schema is extended in-place with payment session hashes and Mercado Pago reconciliation metadata; existing orders remain readable.
highlights: Creates real Mercado Pago boleto orders with the official Orders API and a stable idempotency key.
Redirects the Mercado Pago checkout option to Checkout Pro using server-authoritative items and shipping.
Validates order and payment webhooks with HMAC-SHA256, then fetches the official resource before updating local status.
Requires a one-time opaque payment session token and never accepts amount, price or payer data in the payment endpoint.
Retires legacy public endpoints that accepted arbitrary payment payloads or disabled TLS verification.
rollback: Revert the 9.2.104 payment files. Existing pending Mercado Pago orders remain valid at the provider and must continue to be reconciled before rollback.
